title: Bump expat to version 2.6.3
body:
Expat v2.6.3 fixes a number of CVE issues:

   * https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-28757
   * https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-45490
   * https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-45491
   * https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-45492

Update to 2.6.3 from 2.5.0.  Version of expat used here is the same the upstream
skia repository uses at this point.

**PR Checklist**

- [x] Rebased on top of `skiasharp` at time of PR
- [x] Changes adhere to coding standard
